---
name: Feature request
about: New host, new model in the catalog, new CLI flag, new cookbook entry.
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What's missing

A short description of the gap. "WaveSpeed shipped Veo 4 and `references/models.md` doesn't list it." or "I use Aider but there's no `agents/aider/SKILL.md`."

## Proposed change

What would the fix look like? File paths, snippets, or a sketch is plenty.

## Alternatives considered

If you tried a workaround (manual config, fork, copy-paste from another agent), say so.

## Are you willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR.
- [ ] No — flagging it for someone else.
